headline: Microsoft Disables Repositories Following Sophisticated Password-Stealing Malware Injection
lede: Security teams have shuttered dozens of Azure and AI-focused GitHub projects after detecting malicious code injections targeting developer credentials. This breach underscores the persistent vulnerability of corporate software pipelines to persistent supply chain adversaries.

headline: GentleOS Brings a Simple, Monolithic GUI to Vintage 32-Bit Systems
lede: For those missing the predictability of early computing, this hobbyist OS offers a clean, graphical environment for i386 hardware. It is a nostalgic and functional bridge to the era of bare-metal simplicity.

headline: Genetic Switch Discovered That Locks Plants in Perpetual Youth
lede: Biologists have identified the miR156 molecule as a primary regulator of the transition between juvenile and adult plant phases. This discovery offers a novel mechanism to bypass natural senescence, with implications ranging from evolutionary theory to agricultural resilience.

headline: OpenCV 5 Expands Deep Learning Support to Eighty Percent of ONNX Operators
lede: The latest major release of this foundational library integrates a completely rewritten inference engine. Developers can now leverage expanded model support while maintaining backward compatibility for legacy hardware deployments.

headline: Apple Integrates Gemini Models Into Private Cloud Compute Infrastructure
lede: Apple’s new AI architecture orchestrates a hybrid environment, balancing on-device processing with Google’s cloud-based foundation models. The system aims to provide advanced reasoning capabilities while enforcing strict, verifiable data boundaries.

headline: Apple and Microsoft Diverge on the Future of Personal Agentic AI
lede: As Microsoft pushes thin-client enterprise productivity, Apple pivots toward the iPhone as a context-aware hub for consumer data. The two tech giants are carving distinct paths in the race for agentic utility.
pullquote: The platform that captures personal context wins the battle for user attention.

headline: Thi.ng Refreshes its Modular TypeScript Toolkit for Generative Artists
lede: Evolving from its roots in functional programming, this expansive suite of libraries continues to influence digital fabrication and data visualization. Its bottom-up architecture proves that minimal, decoupled code remains the gold standard for creative tooling.

headline: The Rapid Rise and Fall of the Eagle Computer Clone
lede: In the volatile 1980s, Eagle Computer attempted to challenge the PC market before buckling under legal pressure and tragedy. Their bankruptcy remains a definitive study of how quickly early hardware firms were commoditized.

headline: Apple Intelligence Brings Context-Aware Assistance to the Operating System
lede: Apple is embedding generative capabilities directly into the core of its ecosystem to enhance device-wide functionality. The initiative prioritizes private, local model execution to ensure that Siri can act on personal data without compromising user security.

headline: LLMs Accelerate Coreboot Porting for Aging Lenovo ThinkPad Hardware
lede: Reverse engineering proprietary firmware has long been a daunting task for the open-source community. By combining manual expertise with AI-assisted analysis, developers have successfully breathed new life into older, closed-source hardware.
